title: Gordon
content:
{{Top|ncl}}
{{Cut|canon=1|Star Wars drafts}}
'''Gordon''' was an unsavory [[Spaceport/Legends|starport]] on the planet [[Aquilae (The Star Wars)|Aquilae]] (or [[Utapau (Kessil system)|Utapau]]), located in a wasteland and home to a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]]. A ruined [[temple]] was in the vicinity.

[[Kane Starkiller]] recruited [[Han Solo (The Star Wars)|Han Solo]] into the resistance against the [[Galactic Empire (The Star Wars)|New Galactic Empire]] at Gordon.

[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Oxus]]'s crew were taking a shipment of [[Covina]] to Gordon when Han Solo hijacked his [[Han Solo's pirate ship|pirate ship]].

==Behind the scenes==
Gordon appeared in the treatment summary and rough draft for the film that would become [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''A New Hope'']]. It eventually became [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] in the second draft. The brief mention of Gordon in that draft suggests it is a different, unseen, settlement on [[Utapau (Kessil system)|Utapau]].
